name: Imported Block
creator: 3c05c4d5-37f0-43a8-a16d-9cf0091794af
description: Imported block An embedded workflow that can receive inputs and return an output.

steps.name: Siemplify_Change Priority
steps.description: Automatically change case priority to the given input

steps.name: Siemplify_Instruction
steps.description: Set an instruction for the analyst

steps.name: Siemplify_Add Entity Insight
steps.description: Add an insight configurable message to each targeted entity

steps.name: Siemplify_Change Alert Priority
steps.description: Automatically change the alert priority to the given input. Note: This action is compatible only with Siemplify version 5.6 and higher.

steps.name: Siemplify_Case Comment
steps.description: Add a comment to the case the current alert has been grouped to

steps.name: Siemplify_Add to Custom List
steps.description: Add an Entity Identifier to a categorized Custom List, in order to perform future comparisons in other actions.
